title: Narrative with emotions
subtitle: Make a story more human with feelings and reactions.
duolingoBridge: B1 stories are not only events; they include feelings, reactions, and meaning.
overview: Knowledge point 1: add emotional background with imparfait.
Knowledge point 2: add reaction after the main event.

items.en: Before the interview, I was very nervous.
items.es: Antes de la entrevista, estaba muy nervioso.

items.fr: Je me sentais prêt, mais j’avais peur de ne pas comprendre.
items.en: I felt ready, but I was afraid I would not understand.
items.es: Me sentía preparado, pero tenía miedo de no entender.

items.fr: Tout à coup, la personne m’a parlé lentement et clairement.
items.en: Suddenly, the person spoke to me slowly and clearly.
items.es: De repente, la persona me habló lenta y claramente.

items.fr: Ça m’a soulagé, et j’ai pu répondre avec plus de confiance.
items.en: That relieved me, and I was able to answer with more confidence.
items.es: Eso me alivió, y pude responder con más confianza.

items.fr: À la fin, j’étais fier de moi.
items.en: At the end, I was proud of myself.
items.es: Al final, estaba orgulloso de mí mismo.
